note: DEV trusted setup: hardhat.config.ts setupSettings.contributionSettings.contributions is 0, so these verifiers are NOT from a real ceremony. They back Fuji/BenzoNet ONLY. deploy:mainnet refuses this build (guardrail #4). To make it mainnet-eligible, an operator runs scripts/ceremony/run-ceremony.ts (real phase-2 ceremony + public beacon), commits the regenerated verifiers, and this marker is rewritten to build:"ceremony" with contributions>0, a beacon, and fresh sha256 hashes. See docs/MAINNET_GO_NO_GO.md.
